meaning: adj.(古希腊雅典诗人,悲剧创始者)泰斯庇斯的,悲剧的,戏剧的,悲剧性的n.演员,悲剧演员
examples: His thespian skills were the key to his success.
When it comes to outstanding thespian arts, Japan suffers no dearth.
If you enjoy representing in plays join your school's thespian club.
We put on several Shakespeare plays back when I was a thespian in high school.
In Japan, for example, Kabuki theater is dominated by acting families whose thespian pedigree goes back centuries.
